title: girl_irl & Danny Brown – “Magic”
author: Tom Breihan
summary:
For the past few years, rap great Danny Brown has been collaborating heavily with underground hyperpop producers. He loves that stuff! Those collaborations built up to the release of Stardust, the album that Brown released last year, but they didn’t end there. Now, Brown’s got a new collaboration with an artist who I’d never heard…

The post girl_irl & Danny Brown – “Magic” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
For the past few years, rap great Danny Brown has been collaborating heavily with underground hyperpop producers. He loves that stuff! Those collaborations built up to the release of Stardust, the album that Brown released last year, but they didn't end there. Now, Brown's got a new collaboration with an artist who I'd never heard of before the track came out.

Are you up on girl_irl? Because I'm not. It's the alter-ego of Em Perlman, a DJ, producer, and vocalist who currently has just over 50,000 monthly listeners on Spotify. Danny Brown is real about this shit! He's digging in deep! The new song "Magic" is a skittering, arty club-pop jam with a Brown verse full of magic-show references. Check it out below.
